titleStmt.title: SII 30.184: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 184. (A.R. No. 260 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara Temple-on the north wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājādhirāja-Chōḻa I: Year 26, day 120: 1044 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the praśasti of the king tiṅgaḷēr-taru etc. It records the decision of the assembly, Parākramasōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu in Dāmar-kōṭṭam, which met under a tamarind tree, and decided to sell land as tax-free, for constructing a watershed for quenching the thirst of king Uḍaiyār Rājēndrachōḻadēva and his queen Vīramahādēviyār, who probably died at this village, to Sēnāpati Madurāntakaṉ alias Parākesarivēḷār who was the brother of the queen. The sabhā which received both the price and tax amount, and agreed to remit the taxes on this land. The members of the sabhā and an official of kōṭṭam were mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarkaṭpuṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu min[nu
pa]llūḻiyuṭ ṭeṉṉavar kulamakaṉ māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭiyāṉāp parumaṇippacun=talaip porukaḷattarintu veṇāṭṭaraicaṉai
ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻirāmakuṭa muvarkeṭa muṉintu velaikeḻu kān=taḷur cālaik kalamaṟuttu
ttaṉ kulattavaṉiventaṉ naṉkuṟuta(tai)kaimai Araiciyalurimai varicaiyileyti villavar miṉavar ve
ñciṉar caḷukkiyar vallavar mutaliṉar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirunntu tarā talamvaḷara jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ vayaṅku perumpukaḻ (korāja)
korājakesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āvatu ḷaRead- nāḷ 100 2 10 ṉāl jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattu
ttāmarnāṭṭup parākkiramacoḻaccaruppeti maṅkalattu mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom bhūmi vilaiyāvaṇak kaieḻuttu Uṭaiyār śrīrā
jentracoḻadevar civalokattukku Eḻuntaruḷiṉa tiruppaḷḷipaṭaiyile Uṭaṉe śrīpādatteṟiṭum civalokattukku Eḻun=taruḷiṉa nampirāṭṭiyār viramahā
deviyāṟku śrīmadāhattukku Ivaruṭaṉ piṟan=ta senāpatikaḷ maturān=takaṉāṉa parakecariveḷār vaitta taṇṇirp pan=tal śrīrājādhirā[ja]
taṇṇireri vīramaātevip pererikku pākku nilamākavum viṟṟukkuṭuppa
taṟku nammūr śrīpontaiuṭaiya mahātevar yu yolai tittakkuḷattin vaṭakaraippuḷikkiḻ kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Ikko
ṭṭam vakai ceykinṟa paḻuvūruḻāṉ moṭanārāyaṇanuṅ kūṭaviruntu Icaivu tīṭṭu Eḻuttu maṇaṟpurattu [jeya]nampittak kiramavittanum sti
rasāranampi cīrāmak kiramavittanumayyalūr Iḷaiya Iṣabhavāhana bhaṭṭanum paṇippaṇiyāl viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku
kīḻpāṟkellai Iṟṟiṭaik kālār Ellaikku meṟku tenpāṟkellai śrīpontai Iṟaiyiṟuttilā devatānamāna ciṟutāvūr
ppaḻa(ni)lattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai maṇaṟkunṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iṟainilamāna Ēttakkiṇattukkut teṟkum A
yil naṭuvupaṭṭa nilattāl nīrnilam kuḻi Āyirattu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟuppukkuḻi Eṇṇāyiramum kutaḷu
Innilattiṉāl nāvaṟkaḻani
yākat tiruttikkoḷḷa Innilam tiruttikkoḷḷap peṟuvāṉāka nellum ponnum tiruvekampamuṭaiyār Iccīvitamuḷḷiṭṭut tirukkoṟṟa vā
calil ponta kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭatum veṭṭi yamañciyum Eccoṟumaṟṟu Ūriṭuvariyum Uḷḷiṭṭu maṟṟu mepperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum nāme kuṭu
ppomākavum Innilattāl vanta krayadravyamum Iṟaiydravyamum nāme svammaṟak kaikkoṇṭu candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka cilālekai ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhai
yom mahāsabhaiyār paṇikka Eḻutinen Ivai vaikāṉasan gautama nampiyen bhaṭṭanen Ivai Enneḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
